title: Mellow Pungent Greek Spinach Spanakopita
description: A pungent and pillowy Greek dish featuring puff pastry and spinach, made with ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients and cooked to perfection using sous-vide, perfect for a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: egg substitute
ingredients.notes: such as flax or chia eggs

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the spinach to the skillet and cook until wilted, then set aside to cool.
In a large bowl, combine the cooled spinach mixture, feta cheese, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Brush the edges of the puff pastry with the egg substitute.
Place the spinach mixture in the center of the puff pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the puff pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the spanakopita in a sous-vide bag and seal, then cook in a water bath at 180 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
Remove the spanakopita from the sous-vide bag and bake in the preheated oven for an additional 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
